offense_profile.label: Misdirection Artist
offense_profile.strategic_intent: Use quick throws, RPO space, and low-threshold screens to punish pressure and late-disguise looks.
expected_behavior: offense spacing burn >= 40 across seed pack

defense_profile.label: Disguise Specialist
defense_profile.strategic_intent: Lean into late simulated pressure and coverage movement without escalating into true zero pressure.
expected_behavior: defense disguise burn >= 50 across seed pack
